title: Jamaican Tofu Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful stew made with smoky tofu, jamaican seasonings, and a hint of bitterness from the stew.

ingredients.name: stew
ingredients.notes: your choice of stew, such as beef or vegetable

instructions: Heat oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add onion and garlic and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add bell pepper and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Add jamaican seasoning and cook for 1 minute.
Add tofu and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add stew, tomato paste, and water. Stir to combine.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 20-25 minutes.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
Serve with rice, bread, or over mashed potatoes for a filling meal.
